volunteer.description: Executive member of the Computing Science Graduate Students Association at the University of Alberta, managing financial operations and supporting graduate student initiatives.
responsibilities: Oversee financial planning and resource allocation
Support graduate student community events and programs
Collaborate with executive team on strategic initiatives
volunteer.impact: Supported hundreds of graduate students through financial management and community development

volunteer.organization: Developer Student Clubs (DSC) - Heritage Institute of Technology
volunteer.description: Technical leader at Developer Student Clubs at HITK, conducting technical and soft-skills training sessions impacting hundreds of students.
responsibilities: Design and deliver technical training sessions
volunteer.impact: Impacted hundreds of students through technical education and leadership development

volunteer.organization: HITK Quiz Club - Heritage Institute of Technology
volunteer.description: Head coordinator of the HITK Quiz Club, organizing and conducting quizzing events across multiple domains.
responsibilities: Plan popular culture and general knowledge quizzes
Manage quiz club logistics and scheduling
Engage student community in intellectual competitions
volunteer.impact: Conducted numerous technical, popular culture, and general quizzing sessions for the student community
